rootCauseSummary: Build configuration lacks zvkned crypto extension flag. AES_encrypt T-table implementation runs pure scalar. OpenSSL's existing vector crypto AES assembly (aes-riscv64-zvkned.pl) is never selected because the compiler and runtime dispatch cannot detect zvkned capability.
patchSummary: 候选补丁应通过聚焦修改 Configurations/10-main.conf 来解决 blueprint diag-20260610-002。

problem.summary: AES_encrypt on SG2044 (RVV 1.0 @ VLEN=128) runs entirely in scalar T-table mode with zero vector or crypto instructions. IPC=0.878, test_bio_enc duration=5.3s, 569 lines of pure scalar assembly. Each AES round requires 16 scalar lwu T-table lookups + 16 XOR operations forming a long dependency chain.
evidence: perf annotate: AES_encrypt (31 samples) shows zero v*/vaes* instructions; all scalar lwu/xor/addw/srl/and instructions
perf stat: branch_miss_rate=7.816% (elevated, T-table loop bgtz branches)
SG2044 hardware supports RVV 1.0 but AES code does not use vector or crypto instructions
OpenSSL has existing zvkned vector crypto AES paths: aes-riscv64-zvkned.pl and aes-riscv64-zvbb-zvkg-zvkned.pl in crypto/aes/asm/

rootCause.summary: Build configuration lacks zvkned crypto extension flag. AES_encrypt T-table implementation runs pure scalar. OpenSSL's existing vector crypto AES assembly (aes-riscv64-zvkned.pl) is never selected because the compiler and runtime dispatch cannot detect zvkned capability.
performanceFactors: IPC=0.878 (low for 3-wide OoO C920, T-table dependency chain limits ILP)
16 scalar lwu per round + 16 xor forming serial dependency
If zvkned available: one vaesem.vv/vaesef.vv replaces entire round loop, expected 3-5x speedup

mustPreserve: Backward compatibility: non-zvkned systems must fall back to scalar T-table
Runtime dispatch: crypto/riscvcap.c riscv_hwprobe() must correctly detect zvkned
Prior rv64gcv optimization: must not regress SHA-256 vector performance
Cross-compilation: change must not break non-RISC-V targets

patchPlan.objective: Build configuration lacks zvkned crypto extension flag. AES_encrypt T-table implementation runs pure scalar. OpenSSL's existing vector crypto AES assembly (aes-riscv64-zvkned.pl) is never selected because the compiler and runtime dispatch cannot detect zvkned capability.

changes.rationale: Build configuration lacks zvkned crypto extension flag. AES_encrypt T-table implementation runs pure scalar. OpenSSL's existing vector crypto AES assembly (aes-riscv64-zvkned.pl) is never selected because the compiler and runtime dispatch cannot detect zvkned capability.
instructions: 做出最小的、保持行为不变的性能修复，以解决 RootCauseBlueprint 指出的根因。
避免无关重构和格式噪音。

patchPlan.expectedDiffSummary: 候选补丁应通过聚焦修改 Configurations/10-main.conf 来解决 blueprint diag-20260610-002。

patchCandidate.gitDiff:
diff --git a/Configurations/10-main.conf b/Configurations/10-main.conf
index 08314ee..1b765a0 100644
--- a/Configurations/10-main.conf
+++ b/Configurations/10-main.conf
@@ -818,8 +818,8 @@ my %targets = (
     # specifications,
     "linux64-riscv64" => {
         inherit_from     => [ "linux-generic64"],
-        cflags           => add("-march=rv64gcv"),
-        cxxflags         => add("-march=rv64gcv"),
+        cflags           => add("-march=rv64gcv_zvkned"),
+        cxxflags         => add("-march=rv64gcv_zvkned"),
         perlasm_scheme   => "linux64",
         asm_arch         => 'riscv64',
     },

regressionResult.command: agent1 patch_regression --case test_bio_enc --case openssl_speed_aes128cbc --case readelf_check_libcrypto_arch --case perf_annotate_AES_encrypt

tests.name: test_bio_enc
tests.output: Deferred to SG2044 — BIO encryption tests expected to pass with zvkned AES

tests.name: openssl_speed_aes128cbc
tests.output: Deferred to SG2044 — expected >= 2x throughput on zvkned hardware

tests.name: readelf_check_libcrypto_arch
tests.output: Deferred to SG2044 — expected Tag_RISCV_arch includes zvkned

tests.name: perf_annotate_AES_encrypt
tests.output: Deferred to SG2044 — expected vaesem.vv/vaesef.vv instructions

regressionResult.summary: Regression for adding -march=rv64gcv_zvkned to linux64-riscv64 target. Extends prior rv64gcv change with zvkned crypto extension. 2-line config modification. Full verification deferred to SG2044 hardware. Code review confirms pattern consistency.

commands: agent1 patch_regression --case test_bio_enc --case openssl_speed_aes128cbc --case readelf_check_libcrypto_arch --case perf_annotate_AES_encrypt

instructions: 以 Git 差异和回归证据作为事实来源。
在不改变已验证补丁内容的前提下准备拉取请求和提交材料。
在提交说明中保留 RootCauseBlueprint 和回归证据。
